templates.text: If you're heading to Stowaway's Step, clear Island Tomb a few times around level 4. The spirits give solid xp and you'll learn how to group before it matters.
Plaxitheris on Stowaway's Step is worth killing every time you see it up. Ghostly serpent, hits hard for a starter zone boss, but the drops are good.
Willowwatch Ridge is no joke for a starting zone. Corrupted Oreads and Grassland Ogre Gatherers will flatten you if you pull more than one.
Hidden Hills is great around level 5. Kill A Priel Bandit Recruit for decent coin, then hit The Bone Pits when you feel ready for Zashlyn Bloodbane.
An Apparition of Sivakaya in The Bone Pits drops Leggings of Undying Faith. 25% chance. Worth farming if you're a Windblade.
Watch out for A Faerie Drone in Faerie's Brake. First caster mob most people see and it will ruin your day if you don't close distance fast.
Grizzlepaw in Faerie's Brake. Good leather drops, easy fight if you watch the adds. Just don't pull the faeries next to the bear.
The Molorai Militia in Vitheo's Watch attacks on sight. Every single one of them. Don't walk in expecting friendly NPCs, {player}.
The Lost Sea Giant King in Vitheo's Watch drops Sea Giant's Cutlass and Ring of the Sea Giant King. Both are upgrades you'll use for levels.
Old Krakengard is your first real group dungeon. Bring interrupts for the Molorai Archmage casts or Overseer Orlok will heal through your damage.
Underspine Hollow ogres at 14 to 16, best xp per hour in the game for that bracket. Ogrespice Leaf drops stack up for decent vendor gold too.
Druo the Reborn always spawns in Underspine Hollow. The other bosses rotate -- Agsha of the Soil, Rosle of the Spirits, Obba of the Warkind, Ughl of the Skies.
Fernalla's Revival Plains is the crossroads of the world. You'll pass through it a dozen times leveling. Gruhglor drops Woebringer - Halberd of Stone, huge upgrade for Paladins.
The Blooming Sepulcher questline is the longest in the game. You have to shuttle memories between it and Vitheo's Rest. Don't skip steps or you'll be stuck for hours.
Duskenlight Coast has a giant skull on the skyline. That's the entrance to Jaws of Sivakaya. Don't go in there until 30 plus, it's endgame.
Dusken Giant hits like a truck but moves slow. Kite it if you're ranged. The strange beasts book mentions giants leaving shield-sized footprints in those forests.
Sivakayan Clerics in Blacksalt Strand heal other mobs. Kill the cleric first, always. Learned that one the hard way.
Lazalith, Soldier of Sivakaya in Blacksalt Strand drops Voidbloom Ring. END plus 8, VR plus 3 percent. Solid tank ring for the mid levels.
Elderstone Mines under Blacksalt Strand is where Sivakaya's corruption first touched living flesh. Ravager, The First Infected drops Fungal Edge. 45 percent drop rate, go get it.
Rottenfoot swamp. Nipper creatures everywhere, Sivakayan Raiders and Reavers wandering around, and Tek-Nu Dah lurking in the deep end. Don't go alone below 14.
Plunkey in Rottenfoot drops Aged Prism at 33 percent. Party-wide resists aura. One of the best auras you'll find before endgame.
Spark Queen in Lost Cellar drops decent caster gear. The dungeon is right under Port Azure, easy to pop in and farm between auction house trips.
Braxonian Desert is massive. Desert Jackals and Sand Mummies are the trash, but the Sivakayan invasion force is the real threat. Assassin of Sivakaya will drop you fast.
Ember Acolyte in Braxonian Desert drops both Flamelicked Gorget and Prismatic Warcord at 33 percent each. Farm that mob, {player}. Two best-in-bracket items from one target.
Shroud of Barriers from Braxon Fanatic in the desert. 1.9 percent drop. WIS plus 10, not easy to get but worth the grind if you're a caster.
Silkengrass Meadowlands has the widest level range in the game, 10 to 30. Dire Wolves and Kodiaks for steady xp, and always keep an eye out for Albino Kodiak.
Morian the Ascended in Silkengrass Meadowlands drops Ephermalia, Blade of Waning. 33 percent. Best Windblade dagger for the late 20s bracket.
Windwashed Pass connects half the world. Duskenlight Coast, Silkengrass Meadowlands, Malaroth's Nesting Grounds, and Prielian Cascade all link through here.
Rockshade Hold is the Stoneman dungeon off Windwashed Pass. Bring fire and earth resistance. Diamond Colossus, Pyroclast, and Stoneman Colossus are all elemental fights.
Diamond Claymore from Stoneman Colossus in Rockshade Hold. STR plus 25, proc effect, 33 percent drop rate. Best two-hander for Paladins until endgame.
Volcanic Sceptre from Volcanic Giant in Rockshade Hold. 50 percent drop, INT plus 12, ER plus 15 percent. Every caster needs this wand, no excuses.
Loomingwood is warded against Sivakaya by The Wisp. Safe from corruption, but not from the Minotaurs. Loomingwood Minotaur Hero will end you if you're not ready.
Pteriaped Matron in Loomingwood is a rare spawn. Nests in the high canopy. Keep your eyes up or you'll walk right past it.
Malaroth's Nesting Grounds, levels 20 to 30. Do not feed A Moongill to a Malaroth. The locals say it attracts something worse. Much worse.
Demented Malaroth in the Nesting Grounds is Sivakaya-corrupted and terrifyingly strong. Drops Cursed Hide Shield and Molten Axe at 50 percent. Endgame-quality loot from a zone boss.
Soluna's Landing. Celestial Matter and Living Meteorites everywhere. Raval, The First Paladin is a boss here and drops Erandian Avenger shield at 20 percent.
Astra, Rogue of the Stars in Soluna's Landing drops six best-in-slot weapons at 16.7 percent each. Parallax, Lux, Arc, Eon, Singularity. The most rewarding farm in the game.
The Blight has no safe camps. Every direction, aggressive enemies. Blighted Jackal, Doomwalker, Obsidian Horror. Do not cross it solo below level 28, {player}.
Harbinger of Corruption in The Blight drops Blightsteel Greaves at 66.7 percent. STR plus 12, END plus 12. Almost guaranteed drop, just have to survive the fight.
Ripper DeMerth controls the keep in the far north. Sivakayan forces still patrol outside. Check the cave on the east side for the entrance to Abyssal Lake.
Secret entrance to Abyssal Lake behind the waterfall in Silkengrass Meadowlands. Saves you the trip to Ripper's Keep if you know where to look.
Nipper King in Abyssal Lake drops Terra Crown. CHA plus 35, MR plus 5 percent, PR plus 5 percent. Best helm for a lot of builds, 33 percent drop.
Fallen Braxonia is buried under the desert. Braxonian Honor Guards everywhere. Prince Oslind and Prince Ardant at the end. Oslind drops Oslind's Eviscerator for Windblades.
Prielian Cascade off Windwashed Pass is the Priel bandit stronghold. Savannah Priel herself is the final boss. Tamed Malaroths serve as war beasts in there, watch for them.
Jaws of Sivakaya requires a long unlock quest. Start with A Hermit's Request, recover the Nighthollow Candle, light it, then do the statue puzzle. Say Azynthi to the Ward of Piety.
Vessel Siraethe in Jaws of Sivakaya drops Thryne, Sledge of Creation and Ascended Remains. Two endgame weapons from one boss. Worth the unlock grind.
Azynthi's Garden is endgame. Take the Boatman ferry from The Blight. Molorai Anointed, Molorai Bloodwarden, and Molorai Nightmistress are all over that island.
Vitheo's Rest in Port Azure has four wings. Say Shadowtide to Styria Olafur or the Aquilamar guards will aggro on you. Learned that one from a corpse run.
Shivering Step is a dream zone through the mausoleum. Fearantula, Ghost of Plaxitheris, and Mephallo are the bosses. Ghost of Plaxitheris drops Dreamthread Wings at 50 percent.
Bellwain Island needs no combat level. Pure puzzle zone, rewards Mooring Coin. Take a break from grinding and go solve Captain Bellwain's mystery, {player}.
